propositions: When main advances, signed plan-review attestations read stale and each re-review of a byte-identical plan runs the full criteria set, exposing ~32% same-material verdict instability.

Progressive drift-refresh runs a cheap scoped E4+G1G2 grounding probe against drifted code and refreshes the attestation when the plan still holds, but shipped default OFF pending an unmeasured token/latency justification.
This ticket flips progressive_drift_refresh to default True with explicit False as the back-out path preserving full re-review.
A drift-only-stale re-review under default config should take the scoped probe path (2 agent criteria) instead of the full ~12-criterion agent tier, an ~83% agent-call reduction.
The probe fail-safes to a full re-review on probe error, registry-version skew, or no reusable prior verdict, preserving correctness.
A stale-framing sweep must remove all default-OFF claims about drift-refresh across src/, tests/, and docs/ except dated ADR notes.
